\tzpentry{ID5935}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5935 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} L_\pm Y_\ell^m = \hbar \sqrt{\ell(\ell+1)-m(m\pm1)}\,Y_\ell^{m\pm1} \end{equation}
